title: Implement tsk stats in Python
description: Implement stats: aggregate by type, status, priority. Display project overview.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Python stats command in maintenance module, wired tsk stats CLI output, and added tests for stats counts and CLI output. Tests: python -m pytest python/tests/test_maintenance.py python/tests/test_cli.py, black python/src/taskulus/maintenance.py python/src/taskulus/cli.py python/tests/test_maintenance.py python/tests/test_cli.py, ruff check python/src/taskulus/maintenance.py python/src/taskulus/cli.py python/tests/test_maintenance.py python/tests/test_cli.py.
